resources.title: ngrok-operator GitHub Repository
resources.evidence_quote: The first step is to go to GitHub, where you'll find the organization ngrok and a repository called ngrok-operator.

resources.title: ngrok Helm Chart Repository
resources.evidence_quote: we need to add. The charts.ngrok.com repository. We can just paste this straight in and let Helm do its job.

resources.title: ngrok Traffic Policy Actions Documentation
resources.evidence_quote: Here we have the ngrok documentation. We have a list of all of the actions that we can use as part of a traffic policy.

resources.title: ngrok vs Firewall Game
resources.evidence_quote: This is the ngrok versus the firewall game. As you can see, the ngrok logo at the bottom runs around firing with little bullets to destroy the firewall.
